# Synthetic iPhone Backup Fixture

Generated by `build-fixture.ts` with `bun:sqlite`.

The fixture uses placeholder-only data:

- Contacts: `Alice Example` at `acme-example`, `Bob Example` at `widget-co`
- Handles: `+15550000001`, `+15550000002`
- Messages: six fake iMessage rows across two one-to-one chats

It targets the minimal iTunes-backup SQLite shape used by the importer:

- `Manifest.db` with `Files(fileID, domain, relativePath, flags, file)`
- `Library/SMS/sms.db` via `message`, `handle`, `chat`, `chat_message_join`
- `Library/AddressBook/AddressBook.sqlitedb` via `ABPerson`, `ABMultiValue`

No real device data is included.
